articles.author: Rajesh Pandey
articles.title: Apple looks beyond TSMC to make iPhone and Mac chips
articles.description:
With TSMC’s capacity constraints, Apple is exploring the possibility of tapping into Samsung and Intel foundries for fabricating iPhone and Mac chips.
(via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals.)
articles.content:
Intel-inside Macs and iPhone could make a comeback!?! Photo: D. Griffin Jones/Cult of Mac
